completion_summary: Separated pending-delivery readiness blockers from plan-integrity errors so active proposal branches can pass the full local gate before claim completion, while explicit integration-readiness requirements still fail until delivery is completed.
notes: Active claims remain not integration-ready, but pending delivery is not a plan-integrity error. Explicit readiness requirements still fail.
scope: Separate structurally valid pending adapter proposals from integration readiness so contributors can run the full gate before completing claims
